items.name: Confetti / Particle Burst
items.description: A particle burst from a point — the "ta-da" for a reveal or closing moment.
items.motion: fire once on a step; reduced motion replaces the burst with a simple fade-in

items.name: Gravity Drop
items.description: Elements fall in under gravity with a little friction — a physical entrance for a cluster of items.
items.motion: run on active; reduced motion uses a simple fade-up instead of physics

items.name: Card Hover Lift
items.description: A card lifts and scales slightly under the pointer — polish for interactive (laptop) surfaces.
items.motion: pointer-driven, interactive surfaces only; disable on touch, projection, and reduced motion

items.name: 3D Card Tilt
items.description: A card tilts in 3D toward the pointer — use gsap.quickTo in the move handler, never gsap.to per frame.
items.motion: pointer-driven, interactive surfaces only; disable on touch and reduced motion

items.name: Stacked Card Fan
items.description: A stack of cards fans out into an arc — a reveal for a hand of options.
items.motion: fan on a step; duration 0 for reduced motion

items.name: Magnetic Button
items.description: A button drifts toward the pointer and snaps back on leave — desktop-only micro-delight.
items.motion: pointer-driven, interactive surfaces only; disable on touch and reduced motion

items.name: Button Shimmer
items.description: A light sweep crosses a button — a paused timeline replayed on demand.
items.motion: paused timeline; play on step or hover; skip on reduced motion

items.name: Button Morph
items.description: A button morphs between two states via a paused timeline played and reversed.
items.motion: paused timeline; play/reverse on state change; duration 0 for reduced motion

items.name: Smooth Accordion
items.description: Animate an expand/collapse between height 0 and auto — measure the auto height, then tween.
items.motion: toggle on step or click; duration 0 for reduced motion

items.name: Counter / Number Odometer
items.description: Animate a number from zero to its target with locale formatting — the top pick for KPI and stat moments.
items.motion: run on active; reduced motion sets the final value instantly

items.name: Progress / Stat Bar
items.description: Fill a bar to a target percentage using scaleX (compositor-friendly), not width.
items.snippet:
gsap.set(fill, { scaleX: 0, transformOrigin: 'left center' });
gsap.to(fill, { scaleX: target / 100, duration: 1.2, ease: 'power3.out' }); // on active; stagger multiple bars
items.motion: run on active, stagger multiple bars; reduced motion sets the fill instantly

items.name: Organic Random Entrance
items.description: Each element enters from its own random offset and rotation with a random-order stagger.
items.motion: run on active; duration 0 for reduced motion

items.name: Infinite Wrap Loop
items.description: Cycle values endlessly with gsap.utils.wrap — positions or a 360-degree rotation orbit.
items.motion: loop only while active; pause on reduced motion

items.name: Organic Floating Elements
items.description: Elements drift to new random spots forever via a recursive onComplete — a lava-lamp background.
items.motion: start only while active; do not start under reduced motion

items.name: Infinite Marquee
items.description: An endless horizontal ticker of logos or keywords — pure repeat, no scroll dependence.
items.motion: loop only while active; pause on reduced motion

items.name: Blob Morph Loop
items.description: An organic shape morphs forever between a few reference blobs — a living background element.
items.motion: loop only while active; pause on reduced motion; keep durations slow (3-5s)

items.name: Stroke Draw On
items.description: Draw a line or path on as if hand-drawn — diagram connectors, arrows, underlines that build in.
items.motion: drive on active; duration 0 for reduced motion

items.name: Stroke Erase
items.description: Retract a drawn stroke — the reverse of draw-on — or sweep a moving dash window along a path.
items.motion: drive on a later step; duration 0 for reduced motion

items.name: Scribble Underline
items.description: A hand-drawn wavy underline revealed as an emphasis beat under a headline.
items.snippet:
gsap.set(path, { drawSVG: '0% 0%' });
gsap.to(path, { drawSVG: '0% 100%', duration: 0.4, ease: 'power2.out' }); // on step
items.motion: trigger on a step (not hover); duration 0 for reduced motion

items.name: Signature / Handwriting Reveal
items.description: Sequentially draw multiple pen-stroke paths so the mark looks written — signatures, built-up logos, glyphs.
items.motion: build the timeline on active; reduced motion sets all paths fully drawn instantly

items.name: Multi-Path Sequential Draw
items.description: Draw many diagram segments in order, each timed to its length so pen speed feels constant.
items.snippet:
const dur = (p) => gsap.utils.clamp(0.3, 1.5, DrawSVGPlugin.getLength(p) / 300);
paths.forEach((p) => tl.to(p, { drawSVG: '0% 100%', duration: dur(p) }, '-=0.05'));
items.motion: one timeline on active, or one segment per step for click-paced assembly

items.name: Step-Scrubbed Stroke
items.description: A paused draw-on timeline whose progress is driven by the step index instead of scroll.
items.motion: paused timeline; step change tweens progress; reduced motion jumps to the target progress

items.name: Shape Morph (Simple)
items.description: Morph one SVG path into another (circle to star, etc.) — convert primitives to paths first.
items.motion: trigger on a step; duration 0 for reduced motion

items.name: Icon-to-Icon Morph
items.description: Toggle between two icon states (play/pause, menu/close) — a live-toggle cue for interactive demos.
items.motion: toggle on step or click; duration 0 for reduced motion

items.name: Multi-Shape Morph Sequence
items.description: Morph through several reference shapes in sequence, driven by the step index.
items.motion: paused timeline; step change tweens progress; reduced motion jumps to the target shape

items.name: Element Along Path
items.description: Move a token, avatar, or dot along an (often hidden) SVG path — data flowing through a diagram.
items.motion: run on active; duration 0 for reduced motion

items.name: Auto-Rotate Along Path
items.description: Same as element-along-path but the element turns to face its direction of travel — an arrowhead, a ship.
items.motion: run on active; continuous orbits use repeat -1 and pause on reduced motion

items.name: Step-Driven Path Follower
items.description: An element whose position along a path tracks progress — driven by the step index instead of scroll.
items.motion: paused timeline; step change sets progress; reduced motion jumps to the target position

items.name: SVG Clip-Path Reveal
items.description: Wipe an image or graphic into view by animating an SVG clip rect — a clean masked reveal.
items.snippet:
// clipPath#reveal-clip > rect#clip-rect (objectBoundingBox, height 0); CSS clip-path: url(#reveal-clip)
gsap.to('#clip-rect', { attr: { height: 1 }, duration: 1.2, ease: 'power3.out' }); // on active
items.motion: run on active; duration 0 for reduced motion

items.name: SVG Filter Distortion (Liquid)
items.description: A liquid/glass ripple over one hero element via feTurbulence and feDisplacementMap.
items.motion: trigger on a step, then settle back; skip entirely on reduced motion

items.name: Line Reveal
items.description: A multi-line headline rises in line by line.
items.snippet:
const split = SplitText.create('[sel]', { type: 'lines' });
gsap.from(split.lines, { y: 40, autoAlpha: 0, duration: 0.8, stagger: 0.12, ease: 'power3.out' });
items.motion: gate on active; duration 0 for reduced motion

items.name: Word Reveal
items.description: Words cascade upward into place — the standard split-text entrance for titles.
items.snippet:
const split = SplitText.create('[sel]', { type: 'words' });
gsap.from(split.words, { yPercent: 80, opacity: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.05, ease: 'power3.out' });
items.motion: gate on active; duration 0 for reduced motion

items.name: Character Reveal
items.description: Per-character cascade with a back.out pop — energetic titles and single punch words.
items.snippet:
const split = SplitText.create('[sel]', { type: 'chars' });
gsap.from(split.chars, { y: 20, autoAlpha: 0, scale: 0.8, stagger: 0.03, ease: 'back.out(1.7)' });
items.motion: gate on active; duration 0 for reduced motion

items.name: Masked Line Reveal
items.description: Lines slide up from behind a clip mask — the premium reveal. Needs GSAP 3.13+.
items.motion: trigger inside onSplit when active; duration 0 for reduced motion

items.name: Step-Revealed Text
items.description: Words sit ghosted at low opacity, then brighten to full — revealed as one tween or per step.
items.snippet:
gsap.set(split.words, { opacity: 0.15 });
gsap.to(split.words, { opacity: 1, stagger: 0.15, ease: 'none' }); // on active (or tween by step)
items.motion: brighten on active or per step; reduced motion shows full opacity immediately

items.name: Rotated Character Entrance
items.description: Characters flip in on the X axis in 3D — set perspective on the parent.
items.motion: gate on active; duration 0 for reduced motion

items.name: Scramble Decode
items.description: Text resolves out of random characters — a matrix-style decode for a reveal moment.
items.motion: run on active; reduced motion sets the final text instantly

items.name: Custom Glyph Scramble
items.description: Scramble decode with a themed glyph set: binary "01", Katakana for cyberpunk, dots and dashes for minimal.
items.motion: run on active; reduced motion sets the final text instantly

items.name: Typewriter
items.description: Type text out character by character — terminal lines, commands, captions.
items.motion: run on active; reduced motion sets the full text instantly

items.name: Text Swap / Rotating Headlines
items.description: Cycle one slot word through a list ("build / ship / scale"): fade out, swap, fade in, hold, repeat.
items.motion: loop only while active; pause on reduced motion

items.name: RGB Split Glitch
items.description: Chromatic-aberration glitch bursts on a headline — two colored layers jitter and reset.
items.motion: burst on a step or sparse random timer; skip on reduced motion

items.name: Skew Glitch Burst
items.description: Lightweight single-element skew jitter — a quick attention tic with no extra layers.
items.motion: burst on a step or sparse random timer; skip on reduced motion

items.name: 3D Card Flip
items.description: Flip a card front-to-back in 3D — needs preserve-3d and backface-visibility hidden.
items.motion: flip on a step or click; duration 0 for reduced motion

items.name: Card Expand to Detail
items.description: A card morphs from grid tile into a full detail panel and back — same DOM, animated layout change.
items.motion: trigger on a step click; duration 0 for reduced motion

items.name: Step Stagger Reveal
items.description: Cards or list items stagger in — reach for GSAP only when you need its grid/random stagger distribution.
items.snippet: gsap.from('[sel]', { y: 50, autoAlpha: 0, duration: 0.6, stagger: 0.1, ease: 'power3.out' }); // on active
items.motion: run on active; prefer the platform default entrance for plain cases; duration 0 for reduced motion

items.name: Flip Grid Filter
items.description: Re-filter a grid and have surviving items smoothly relayout into their new slots.
items.motion: drive per step (each step = a filter); duration 0 for reduced motion

items.name: Transition Wipe
items.description: A full-screen accent panel wipes across on enter/exit — a between-view wipe overlay.
items.motion: hook to the surface change (slide/scene advance); duration 0 for reduced motion

items.name: Step-to-Value Range Mapping
items.description: Map step progress to any value range with mapRange and clamp built outside the update callback.
items.motion: drive by step progress; values apply instantly (reduced-motion safe)

items.name: Pointer-to-Value Range Mapping
items.description: Map pointer position to a value range, applied through gsap.quickTo — desktop-interactive surfaces only.
items.motion: pointer-driven, interactive surfaces only; disable on touch and reduced motion

items.name: Color Interpolation
items.description: Interpolate between two colors by progress — handles hex, rgb, hsl, and named colors.
items.motion: drive by step progress; apply with gsap.set

items.name: Radial / Grid Stagger
items.description: Ripple a stagger outward from the center or edges of a grid using gsap.utils.distribute.
items.motion: run on active; duration 0 for reduced motion

items.name: Chained Utility Pipeline
items.description: Compose a value transform once with gsap.utils.pipe (normalize, map, snap) and reuse it.
items.motion: composition helper; inherits the drive mode of whatever consumes it

items.name: Snap-to-Grid Drag
items.description: Drag an element with inertia that settles onto a grid via a snap function.
items.motion: interactive surfaces only; disable on reduced motion (no throw physics)

items.name: Custom Easing
items.description: Register a brand ease once and reuse it everywhere by name — plus CustomBounce and CustomWiggle.
items.motion: define once at setup; eases apply wherever recipes run

items.name: Draggable Element
items.description: A momentum-draggable element with bounds — the base for hands-on demo surfaces.
items.snippet:
gsap.registerPlugin(Draggable, InertiaPlugin);
Draggable.create('[sel]', { type: 'x,y', bounds: '[container]', inertia: true });
items.motion: interactive surfaces only; disable inertia on reduced motion

items.name: Draggable Carousel
items.description: A momentum carousel that snaps to each panel width after a throw.
items.motion: interactive surfaces only; disable inertia on reduced motion

items.name: Swipe / Gesture Observer
items.description: Unified touch/pointer/wheel gesture detection with an isAnimating guard — could drive step navigation.
items.motion: guard with isAnimating; the platform nav layer owns navigation — use with care
